questions.question: A system with input $x[n]$, gives the output signal $y[n]=x^2[n]+x\left[n^2\right]$. Which of the following properties does this system have?
A unit step signal is given as input to two distinct systems - a differentiator system and an accumalator system. The corresponding outputs will be?

answers.a: A unit step and a ramp signal respectively
answers.b: A unit ramp and a unit impulse respectively
answers.c: A unit impulse and a ramp signal respectively

questions.question: A unit step signal is given as input to a cascade of two systems - a differentiator system and an accumalator system. The corresponding outputs will be?

answers.a: A unit step and a ramp signal respectively
answers.b: A unit impulse and a unit step signal respectively
answers.c: A unit impulse and a ramp signal respectively

questions.question: An impulse input signal generates two impulses at the output for an LTI system. If sum of two distinct impulses is given as input to this system, the output will contain
When a moving average system of length $M$ is used for noise suppression,

answers.a: For large M, there is more suppression of noise
answers.b: For small M, there is more suppression of noise
answers.c: the system does not change the signal at all
